question: What is the confidence label mismatch rate across all lessons?
method: confidence_audit.py scanned 1311 lessons for evidence-vs-label mismatches using 7 evidence patterns and aspiration/hypothesis markers
expect: 30-50 aspirational lessons (based on pragmatist steerer claim of 47)

result.first_pass_fp_rate: 82% (67 superseded via body mention -> 12 via title/status)

verdict: PARTIALLY CONFIRMED — quality issues exist but at 2.9%, much lower than steerer-implied rate. The dominant issue is superseded backlog (12), not aspiration (11).
